lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': "Roku HD1000 was the original Roku streaming device (2008). lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': "NEC's methanol fuel cell laptop prototype was announced in 2003 with plans for commercial launch in 2004.
